tables.title: Respiratory Emergency Differential at a Glance
rows: Improves with nebulized beta-2 agonist; silent chest = critical
COPD history; diminished unilateral breath sounds; no trauma

tables.title: Wheeze Progression: What It Means
rows: Airway narrowing with some air movement
Wheeze quieting as patient tires/becomes anxious
Critical obstruction, minimal air movement — most severe
